description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6 Docker image and defines two stages: test and publish. Include a before_script that creates a virtual environment with python3 -m venv fctx, upgrades pip, activates the venv, upgrades wheel and setuptools, and installs test requirements from requirements_test.txt. Add a test-django-sqlite job in the test stage that runs make test-all. No artifacts, caches, or special rules are defined.
